title: hymenophyllum protrusum
intro: Hymenophyllum protrusum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to survive in a desiccated state and revive when water is available. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum protrusum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and act as an antioxidant. Hymenophyllum protrusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
